classes.description: closed or partially scanned governed batch-contract families used during tranche selection
whole-plane scan state used to decide whether a fresh quality assessment is still required
closed-by-default governance or relocation lanes that should not be reopened casually

surfaces.nextAction: Skip CPF batch barrel families during fresh tranche selection unless master architecture scope expands.
surfaces.reopenCondition: Reopen only through fresh GC-018 when a new whitepaper target introduces a genuinely unclosed CPF surface.

surfaces.nextAction: Treat the dispatch-gate-runtime-async-status-reintake family as closed and move to fresh quality assessment elsewhere.
surfaces.reopenCondition: Reopen only through fresh GC-018 when a new EPF surface outside the closed dispatch family is explicitly authorized.

surfaces.nextAction: Fresh tranche selection may assess GEF before implementation starts; do not assume closed state from CPF or EPF evidence.
surfaces.reopenCondition: N/A until a governed GEF scan or tranche authorization records closure or open-candidate posture.

surfaces.nextAction: Fresh tranche selection may assess LPF before implementation starts; do not assume closed state from CPF or EPF evidence.
surfaces.reopenCondition: N/A until a governed LPF scan or tranche authorization records closure or open-candidate posture.

surfaces.nextAction: Do not open another broad relocation wave; use docs curation and publication-boundary clarification only.
surfaces.reopenCondition: Reopen only through preservation override plus fresh GC-019 and GC-039 on a dedicated restructuring branch and secondary worktree.
